questions.question: Which architecture best supports rotating credentials for millions of constrained IoT devices?
questions.description: Large fleets need automated provisioning, rotation, revocation, and monitoring of device identities.

questions.question: Which signal can indicate a compromised IoT device in a fleet?
questions.description: Traffic to unusual destinations or at unusual rates can reveal compromise.

questions.question: Which design limits the blast radius of a stolen device certificate?
questions.description: Per-device identities allow targeted revocation without disrupting the entire fleet.
